name: Voice Input
author: CliDeck
description: Dictate prompts with your voice using Whisper speech-to-text

settings.label: ASR Backend
settings.description: OpenAI Whisper (remote) or local MLX model (macOS)

settings.label: Record Key
settings.description: Key to start/stop recording (e.g. F4, F8)

settings.label: Replacements File
settings.description: Path to text replacements file (wrong => correct per line)
